login.title: Sign in to continue
login.description: Sign in with your credentials or your organization's single sign-on.
login.mockHint: Demo credentials — admin / admin (super-admin) or operator / operator (tenant admin).

callback.error: We could not complete sign in. Please try again.

expired.title: Your session has expired
expired.description: For your security, please sign in again to continue.

accessDenied.title: No access
accessDenied.description: Your account is not linked to any tenant. Please contact your administrator.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
